sudoku.generation.symmetry.AbstractSymmetry

Package
Description
sudoku.generation
 
sudoku.generation.symmetry
 

  • Uses of AbstractSymmetry in sudoku.generation

    Constructors in sudoku.generation with parameters of type AbstractSymmetry
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    SudokuGenerator(ISudokuGenerator.PuzzleDifficulty difficulty, AbstractSymmetry symmetry)
    Initialises a SudokuGenerator with the given target difficulty.

  • Uses of AbstractSymmetry in sudoku.generation.symmetry

    Subclasses of AbstractSymmetry in sudoku.generation.symmetry
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    DihedralSymmetry
    The puzzle is to be symmetric both rotationally and reflectionally.
    class 
    NoSymmetry
    There is to be no enforced symmetry in the puzzle.
    class 
    ReflectionalSymmetry
    The givens are mirrored vertically, creating identical left-to-right halves.
    class 
    RotationalSymmetry
    Two-fold (180 degree) rotation: the grid looks the same if you turn it completely upside down.
